description.value: Price 2,000 gp; Slot ring; CL 11th; Weight â; Aura moderate transmutation DESCRIPTION When the wearer of this ring is bloodraging, he can expend 1 round of bloodrage to extend the duration of a beneficial spell affecting him with a duration of 1 round per level or greater by 2 rounds. This is a free action the wearer can take once per round. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 1,000 gp; Feats Endurance, Extend Spell, Forge Ring; Special creator must have the bloodrage class feature
